channel.title: Vox Language Updates
channel.description: Changelog, release notes, and documentation updates for the Vox AI-native programming language, maintained by the Vox Foundation.

item.title: Codebase Cleanup & Signal Improvement Plan (2026-05-02)
item.description: Six-phase plan to retire stale code, fix broken references, and converge on single sources of truth.

item.title: Architecture Index
item.description: Auto-generated architecture index.

item.title: GUI Authoring Syntax (2026): Vox UI as Values (VUV)
item.description: Replaces JSX-shaped view bodies and Tailwind class strings with typed function-call views. No tags, no class strings, no CSS files in user code. Lowers to…

item.title: Phase 5: Bidirectional Vox↔React Interop Spec (2026)
item.description: Design spec for importing React components into Vox source, making emitted Vox components consumable by external React apps, and retiring @island.

item.title: How to author Vox views (VUV)
item.description: Practical guide to writing UI in Vox using the view-call (VUV) authoring syntax. Covers primitives, typed style kwargs, conditionals, components, and escape…

item.title: How-To: Islands and Pages
item.description: How to build and route full-stack web UIs using islands in Vox.

item.title: cli
item.description: Documentation for cli.md

item.title: Deployment: Docker, Compose, Coolify, CI (SSOT)
item.description: Official documentation for Deployment: Docker, Compose, Coolify, CI (SSOT) for the Vox language. Detailed technical reference, architectu

item.title: Mesh / Populi SSOT (CPU-first)
item.description: Official documentation for mesh (Populi) runtime, env vars, and HTTP control plane (CPU-first).

item.title: Tutorial: Building UI with VUV view-calls
item.description: Learn how to build modern, reactive UIs in Vox using the view-call (VUV) authoring syntax — function calls + trailing-block children + typed style kwargs.

item.title: ADR 010 — TanStack as the Vox web spine
item.description: Official documentation for ADR 010 — TanStack as the Vox web spine for the Vox language. Detailed technical reference, architecture guide

item.title: ADR 017: Populi lease-based authoritative remote execution
item.description: Normative target model for single-owner lease semantics, A2A transport, and local fallback when promoting remote execution beyond best-effort relay.

item.title: ADR-027: Dual-Track UI Surfaces (Vox-Native vs React/TanStack Interop)
item.description: Splits Vox's UI primitives into a Vox-native reactivity track and an explicit React/TanStack interop track, with a sharp boundary so each track stays coherent…

item.title: ADR-028: Remove Stub Durability/Scheduling Grammar from Public API
item.description: Proposes removing @scheduled, @durable, workflow, and activity from the public Vox grammar, retaining actor with documented limitations, following the…

item.title: ADR 030 — state_machine as SSoT for reactive UI state
item.description: Formally adopts the Vox state_machine compiler primitive as the single source of truth for all reactive browser UI state in vox-dashboard and Vox-generated…

item.title: ADR 031 — Deprecate vox-vscode; dashboard is the primary surface
item.description: Formally deprecates the vox-vscode VS Code extension as the primary Vox user surface. The Axum-served vox-dashboard is the replacement. vox-vscode is retained…

item.title: Architecture Decision Records (ADR)
item.description: Official documentation for Architecture Decision Records (ADR) for the Vox language. Detailed technical reference, architecture guides, a

item.title: vox-codegen-ts API
item.description: API reference for the vox-codegen-ts crate: HIR-to-TypeScript/TSX code generation pipeline.

item.title: Orchestrator Stage 1 & 2: Security + Crash-Prevention Implementation Plan
item.description: Implementation plan for 7 P0/P1 fixes across the orchestrator gateway, runtime, grounding, and daemon surfaces. Covers FIX-K-03, FIX-K-05, FIX-K-06, FIX-B-02…

item.title: Durability & Scheduling Runtime Audit (2026)
item.description: Definitive audit of @scheduled, @durable, DurabilityKind, actor/workflow/activity keywords — what parses vs. what executes. Verdict: zero runtime…

item.title: External Frontend Interop Plan (2026)
item.description: Five-phase plan to make Vox interoperable with the React/TS ecosystem in both directions: keep Vox's GUI authoring (TS/React emission), add bidirectional…

item.title: Legacy URL Redirects on GitHub Pages
item.description: How the Vox docs site handles old mdBook-era URLs via static HTML stubs on GitHub Pages.

item.title: GUI-Native Language Roadmap — Execution Status
item.description: Live tracking of task completion for the Vox GUI-native language roadmap (April 2026).

item.title: Internal Web IR Implementation Blueprint
item.description: Implementation plan, acceptance gates, and parity requirements for the Vox internal Web IR layer.

item.title: Orchestrator Companion Audit — Non-Routing Surface Critique & Improvement Plan
item.description: Full-system audit of crates/vox-orchestrator and surrounding surfaces excluding model-routing (covered by model-orchestration-ssot-audit-2026.md). ~280…

item.title: v0.8.0 — @require, @pure, @deprecated Decorators; 10 LSP Features
item.description: Added @require, @pure, and @deprecated decorators. Implemented 10 Language Server Protocol features including hover, go-to-definition, and inline diagnostics.

item.title: v0.7.0 — QLoRA Training Pipeline; Socrates Anti-Hallucination Protocol
item.description: Native QLoRA fine-tuning via Candle and qlora-rs. Socrates confidence protocol integrated into the orchestrator for anti-hallucination validation of agent outputs.

item.title: v0.6.0 — Mens Transport; Durable Workflow Runtime MVP
item.description: CPU-first mens registry with optional HTTP control plane. Interpreted workflow runtime MVP supporting local and mens activity hooks.
